programme.title: What If: Cosmos
programme.sub-title: Do the hustle! Jumping Into Saturn, Black Holes, and Disco Moons
programme.desc: Get groovy with science as we leap into Saturn, black holes, and the shimmering secrets of disco moons!

programme.title: What If: Cosmos
programme.sub-title: A Star Is Born: Changing Orbits and the Birth of a New Star
programme.desc: Experience the cosmic dance of changing orbits that leads to the birth of a new star. Witness stellar creation unfold!

programme.title: What If: Chase Dies in Space
programme.sub-title: What If You Fell Into Jupiter
programme.desc: We don't know for sure what Jupiter's core is made of. But we do know that Jupiter is the largest and oldest planet in our Solar System.

programme.title: What If: Chase Dies in Space
programme.sub-title: What If You Spent 5 Seconds on Io?
programme.desc: This is Io. One of the four largest moons of Jupiter. A terrifying, inhospitable world, it's got huge lakes of molten lava bigger than an average city. Will Chase survive there?

programme.title: Hacksmith: Building Star Wars
programme.sub-title: Carbon Freeze, Han's Blaster, Mando Armor
programme.desc: Take a closer look at some of Star Wars' most iconic equipment, from the chilling carbon freeze to Han Solo's blaster and the indestructible Mandalorian armor—unveiling the tech behind the legends!

programme.title: Hacksmith
programme.sub-title: Mouse Droid, Grapple Gun, Mandalorian Helmet
programme.desc: Explore iconic Star Wars tech in this episode, from the clever Mouse Droid to the powerful Grapple Gun and the legendary Mandalorian Helmet—see how these gadgets come to life!

programme.title: Hacksmith: Building Star Wars
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the iconic companions of a Mandalorian, from trusty droids to battle-ready gear, and discover what makes these allies essential for survival in the galaxy!

programme.title: Hacksmith
programme.desc: Join the galaxy’s finest as we explore Jedi training techniques, the power of Mandalorian and Han Solo's blasters, and the weapons that define Star Wars legends!

programme.title: Aperture
programme.desc: Embark on a thrilling journey through the cosmos, from the mysteries of deep space to the cutting-edge technology pushing humanity further into the unknown!

programme.title: Aperture
programme.desc: Explore the age-old question of extraterrestrial life. Dive into the search for aliens, the science behind the possibilities, and what it would mean for humanity if we’re not alone in the universe.

programme.title: Hacksmith: Building Star Wars
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the iconic companions of a Mandalorian, from trusty droids to battle-ready gear, and discover what makes these allies essential for survival in the galaxy!

programme.title: Hacksmith

programme.title: Starbase Update
programme.desc: NASASpaceflight.com's weekly look at the happenings around Starbase. This week at Starbase, Pad B takes a giant leap forward with the installation of chopsticks, the digging of the flame trench, and the tank farm coming together. Meanwhile, Booster 15 moves closer to static fire, Ship 34 nears testing, and Massey’s test site sees preparations for Block 2 hardware. Plus, our flyover reveals SpaceX’s upgraded pad design, showing how lessons from Pad A are shaping Starbase’s future.

programme.desc: Dive into the future of space travel and the innovations driving a new era of exploration in 'Galactic Shift'!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Sour teasing Apple escalates into a "prank war" between the two of them. After the girls' feud disrupts the town, they are sentenced in a Berry Bitty City-style trial to camp alone together for a whole weekend. Miraculously, they emerge best buds, and their friends are relieved, until Sour's influence on Apple turns her into a mini-Sour, and they have to do a personality "makeover" on Apple.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Apple feels left out of a Berryball game and an advanced ballet class, she invents some "groove booties" programmed to dance to any beat. She temporarily impresses her friends with her dance moves, but when the groove booties go out of control and threaten the town's Berryball game, she is forced to fess up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show. Wanting to impress them, Huck offers to have TomTom join the show... despite the pup's obvious dislike of performing in public. It's up to Strawberry to help Huck see that he should not force TomTom into something he just doesn't want to do.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When a simple tune Cherry composes goes viral on the Berryweb, Cherry quickly gets fed up with everyone listening to this song, everywhere, all the time. She goes to comic lengths to get some peace so she can compose the song she's suppose to write for the Queen of Berryvania.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: The Neighbourhood Nightmare
programme.desc: After a single mother, who launches a neighbourhood watch scheme, falls for her handsome neighbour, she begins to fear that he is not as perfect as he seemed. Starring Julie McNiven (2018)

programme.title: Dangerous Attraction
programme.desc: Amanda Righetti stars as a woman battling to stop living in fear after a co-worker develops a dangerous obsession with her. (2012)

programme.title: Deadly Exchange
programme.desc: A mother and daughter invite an exchange student into home, only to be interrupted by a suspicious murder. Starring Lindsay Hartley (2016)

programme.title: A Good Old Fashioned Orgy
programme.desc: Eric is a thirty-something party animal famous among his close circle of friends for his lavish summer theme parties at his father's swanky Hamptons pad. But when members of the crew start settling down, and Eric's dad announces plans to sell the beach house, Eric decides it's time for one last bash to go out with a proverbial bang - a good old-fashioned orgy.

programme.title: Flight Of The Monarch Butterfly 3 D
programme.desc: The Monarch Butterfly is among the ranks of the most mysterious and fascinating insects on our planet with its beauty and grace having a tremendous appeal among young and old alike. Accompany these blissful living beings on their incredible journey and delve into the myth that encompasses them.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo World At His Feet
programme.desc: Cristiano Ronaldo: The World at His Feet follows the footballer from his beginnings in Portugal, breakthrough start with Manchester United and current career at Real Madrid.

programme.title: Battle Of Dunkirk From Disaster To Triumph
programme.desc: Relive the bravery of the Dunkirk veterans in defenseless boats crossing the English Channel to rescue the stranded soldiers from the inferno through their uplifting stories of heroism in a battle that changed the course of WWII.

programme.title: Who Gets the Dog?
programme.desc: A couple going through a divorce squabble over custody of their beloved dog.

programme.title: Grace Is Gone
programme.desc: After learning that his wife has been killed in Iraq, a man takes his two daughters on a roadtrip to Florida.

programme.title: Six Weeks
programme.desc: A terminally ill girl tries to set up her mom, fulfilling her dream of having a family for her last six weeks.

programme.title: Grace Unplugged
programme.desc: A talented young church singer runs away to Los Angeles in the hope of becoming a star.

programme.title: Grace Is Gone

programme.title: Love at Mariposa Beach
programme.desc: Upon returning to her place of birth, a journey of reflection causes Claire to discover love. Starring Lucía Gómez-Robledo (2022)

programme.title: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: The locals of Windwards Island always knows when talented baker Matt has fallen in love, his loaves taste delicious. So, when his bread stops tasting bland, is it due to the newcomer or friend Annie?

programme.title: Make Me A Match
programme.desc: Follows Boom, the son of a matchmaker, and Vivi, a creative executive at a dating app company. Starring Rushi Kota (2023)

programme.title: Two For The Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer prepares for the biggest race of his life all whilst falling for a local ski instructor. Starring Trevor Donovan (2021)

programme.title: Miracle In East Texas
programme.desc: Two con men try to convince a group of widows to invest in worthless oil wells during the Great Depression.

programme.title: The Wedding Planners
programme.desc: When groom Tyler leaves life on the world stage, he and June aren't sure they really know each other. (S1 E07)

programme.title: Surviving Love
programme.desc: Jessica Miller is thrust into the "real" world when she graduates from college. To conquer this new world, she must discover her faith, open a box of memories and learn the simple secrets of life only a mother can share.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Prescription For Love
programme.desc: Claire, a nurse, fights for a chance at love with a charming new doctor and for a promotion to free herself from the misery her supervisor creates. As her supervisor tries to derail Claire's chance at happiness, Claire will have to stand up for herself and go after her dreams.

programme.title: Life is Tough, Eh Providence
programme.desc: An eccentric bounty hunter named Providence captures and sets free a criminal in order to collect the same bounty over and over again in different states, until they discover that a local sheriff is up to something crooked.

programme.title: The Covered Wagon
programme.desc: Two wagon caravans converge at what is now Kansas City, and combine for the westward push to Oregon. On their quest the pilgrims will experience desert heat, mountain snow, hunger, and indian attack.

programme.title: Four Rode Out
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal sets out to bring in a Mexican bandit accused of killing his girlfriend's father, but it turns out that there's more to the story than there first appears to be.

programme.title: Neath the Arizona Skies
programme.desc: A cowboy escorts a little girl, whose mother made her the heir of a cash-able oil company, and must protect her from an outlaw as they search for the girl's father.

programme.title: Nuts about Squirrels
programme.desc: Squirrels have conquered tundra, deserts, forests and more, developing ingenious life skills along the way, from stashing nuts to fighting snakes.

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring land of extremes. From the cold and fearsome waters of Tierra Del Fuego and the Antarctic Peninsula to the frozen Patagonian steppe, we follow the animals living on the very edge of existence, having to survive is some of the most extreme environments on earth. King Penguins court on the windswept coast leopard seals hunt amongst the ice floes and young pumas take their first steps toward independence is this South American final Frontier.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: Chile is at the mercy of weather systems that have shaped the nation. In the South, strong westerlies bring rains that create rich green Valdivian forests, carpeting the neotropic ecozone. The Valdivian forests of Chile are a unique ecosystem harbouring species of a ‘land before time' – The forests of Valdivia represent the unique assemblage of ancient species, both floral and faunal, which today persist as relicts of Gondwanaland.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile
programme.desc: Chile is a ribbon of land trapped by natural borders. At its Northern edge, the driest desert in the world cuts off the country from the rest of South America. Here, in the Atacama desert, wildlife has spent millions of years adapting to a life without water. Those that survive have learnt that no opportunity comes without its fair share of risk, but for the animals of the Atacama, only those that dare, will make it in the most unforgiving desert on Earth.

programme.title: Penguins: The African Chaplin
programme.desc: The African penguin is the only penguin species in Africa. Their clumsy demeanour has seen them called the Charlie Chaplins of the bird world. But they are struggling to escape extinction. Despite the protection of their breeding islands, numbers fall. Scientists race to find the answers for the staggering decline. Is there a glimmer of hope for the African Chaplin?

programme.title: Tundra
programme.desc: What at first it can seem an icy wasteland, the tundra is actually a tapestry of interconnected life creatures relying on one another to survive the long winter.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Dardley joins Kristina at Ivory Lodge on the edge of Hwange National Park where her predator sightings just keep getting better. They get unbelievably close to wild cheetah and witness something incredible.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Corsica looks like an alpine landscape in the Mediterranean, an island with dramatic rock formations, romantic bays and proud inhabitants who see themselves first and foremost as Corsicans and only then as French. The Greeks in ancient times called the island Kalliste: the beautiful. We explore this fascinating mountain world in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Sardinia is the second-largest island in the Mediterranean. The Sardin-ians themselves say it's a "continent for itself", a virtual world of its own, full of magic: A beach, gleaming in unreal pink shades, red corals protect against the evil eye and the inhabitants seem to remain forever young. On Sardinia, the owners of luxury yachts adopt sheep, fish have gold in their bellies and a giant mussel supplies the material for legendary sea silk. No one is surprised, that the Madonna goes on a sea cruise once a year.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Venice has been attracting people as if by magic for centuries. The Italians call her La Serenissima, or the sublime. Perched on wooden posts, she braves the elements and the huge, annual surge of visitors. Vogalonga is the name of a Venetian sports competition for women, in which the participants row their boats standing. This is a tradition that Guilia and Elena also follow. They train hard, as the yearly regatta is soon to begin. Anyone caught driving their water vehicle with more than 7 km/h through the canals of Venice, risks getting a ticket from local policewoman Lorenza Mariutti. The reason: the resulting waves gnaw at the foundations of the grand palaces. Venetians are very attached to their traditional cuisine. The island of Sant' Erasmo is the town's garden. Artichokes, radicchio, onions, everything that grows here is said to taste fantastic, thanks to the salt content of the air and water. Carlo and Claudio Finotello not only grow the vegetables, they even deliver directly to their customers' doors. At sunset, they sail through the lagoon with their boat, brimming with produce, towards San Marco. People waiting at the many bridges, now receive their wares: regional, seasonal, fresh. And without a hint of stress if possible. Like so many other things in Venice. Perhaps because La Serenissima is also known as "The Composed".

programme.title: Dream Islands Of Europe: Capri, Ischia and Procida
programme.desc: Capri and Ischia are world famous. From Naples, it's just a short hop over to the two islands. Perfect destinations, then, for a week's cruise along the Gulf of Naples and the adjoining Amalfi Coast to the south. There, Positano, Amalfi or Salerno as well as a handful of other mostly small harbor towns are extremely worthwhile destinations.

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: The Sulcis Archipelago is located off the south-western coast of Sardinia and is part of the province of of southern Sardinia. The islands of San Pietro, Sant'Antioco and Isola Piana form the archipelago, together with several uninhabited islets and rocks form the archipelago. It belongs to the less known areas in Italy and is little developed for tourism. Nevertheless stars like Tom Cruise and Roberto Cavalli come here to enjoy the peace, seclusion and good food. The islanders are only moderately interested in these visitors, and their down-to-earth attitude has never lost. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: Lake Iseo is located on the southern foothills of the Alps. It extends over the provinces of Brescia and Bergamo in the northern mainland of Italy. In the middle of Lake Iseo lies the largest island of the southern European inland waters. Monte Isola, as the island is called after its central mountain lies close to its two neighboring islands, Isola di San Paolo and Isola di Loreto. As early as the 11th century, a monastic association of Benedictines settled here. For many Italians, Lake Iseo is the most beautiful spot in their homeland. It is all the more astonishing how little the influence of tourism is here. Driving is strictly forbidden on the three islands, and only on Monte Isola. Only on Monte Isola there is a regular bus service in the summertime. Thus, the three islands are an oasis of an oasis of tranquility most of the year. The historical buildings and the nature remind of the long tradition in which the Italians have cultivated this retreat. Only every five years in the autumn a big celebration takes place. Then over 200,000 paper flowers decorate the island. The flowers are reminiscent of the time in the Middle Ages when a Roma woman brought her son to the island to be cured from the from the rampant plague. In gratitude, she donated a sea of flowers. The Festa di Santa Croce has been one of the main attractions in northern Italy ever since. The days are radiant with color, it is the only time when it gets crowded in the small streets of the island villages. The next festival was celebrated in September 2021. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: The Tuscan Archipelago is a group of islands at the height of Florence. The archipelago stretches from the Ligurian Sea to the Tyrrhenian Sea, north-east of Corsica. The archipelago consists of seven main islands - Giglio, Elba, Gianutri, Capraia, Pianisoa, Gorgona and Montecristo - and other smaller islands and rocks. Not all of them are inhabited. We look at the three most extraordinary islands of the archipelago: Elba, Capraia and the island of Montecristo. The Tuscan Archipelago is one of the most important natural wonders of the world and is protected as Parco Nazionale dell'Arcipelago Toscano. With its 61.474 hectares of protected and 17,694 hectares of protected land area, it is the largest marine protected area in in Europe. Capraia is the third largest island of the archipelago and is located with its small harbor in the channel in front of Corsica. The island is an autonomous municipality with about 300 inhabitants. It is also considered the most maritime island of the archipelago. At the end of the eighties, the penal colony on Capraia was closed was closed and the island opened to tourism. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: Far from the glamour and spotlight of Lampedusa, Pantelleria is one of the best kept secrets among the Italian islands. Located closer to Tunisia than to the Italian mainland, Pantelleria closer to Tunisia than to the Italian mainland, Pantelleria has been nicknamed "The Last Island," a title also given by Giosuè Calaciura gave to his 2016 historical novel set on Pantelleria. Pantelleria, that is the island of lava, capers and of the liqueur wine that comes here Zibibbo. An island with an ancient history, where for centuries farmers and fishermen have pursued their craft. their craft. The famous Zibibbo grapes are cultivated here - among other things also on the vineyard that Gerard Depardieu and his wife Carole Bouquet bought to produce traditional liqueur and nutmeg wine themselves and distribute it worldwide. The cuisine of the island is as much Arabic as Italian, couscous with fish is a typical island dish. (S1 E04)

Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril

programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Wakey Wakey // Rules of the Road
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.sub-title: A Colorful Way to Cool Off // Seeing in Believing

The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.
